summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new CRM features: Google Auth integration with Emergent Auth, XLSX export/import functionality, CloudBackupModal, and protected routes. All major new features are working excellently with high-quality Turkish localization.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Intermittent 520 response instead of expected 400 when no session_id provided

passed_tests: Backend API connectivity (36/37 tests passed - one intermittent auth endpoint issue)
Google Auth Login Page: E1 CRM branding and Google sign-in button working perfectly
Login Page: Turkish interface with proper 'Google ile Giriş Yap' button text
Auth Callback Page: Exists and handles redirects correctly without session_id
Protected Routes: Correctly redirect to login when not authenticated (/customers -> /login)
Authentication Flow: Test user session creation and access working
Authenticated Dashboard: Main app loads correctly with Turkish interface and user info
XLSX Export Endpoints: All three endpoints working (customers/xlsx, customers/template, visits/template)
CloudBackupModal: Opens from Cloud button with proper Turkish interface
CloudBackupModal: Google Drive and OneDrive buttons present with 'Yükle' text
CloudBackupModal: Download backup button enabled and functional
CloudBackupModal: Clear 3-step instructions in Turkish for cloud backup process
ImportModal: Two-step selection working (Company vs Visit import)
ImportModal Company: Template download from backend working correctly
ImportModal Company: File upload area supports XLSX and CSV formats
ImportModal Visit: Requires customer selection (excellent UX design)
ImportModal Visit: Template download appears after customer selection
ImportModal Visit: Customer dropdown shows available customers (3 found)
XLSX Template Downloads: Both company and visit templates download successfully
Data-testid Attributes: All interactive elements properly tagged for testing
Turkish Localization: Consistent high-quality Turkish interface throughout

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all new auth and XLSX features working perfectly)
